excerpt: Then he made one last effort to search in his heart for the place where his affection had rotted away, and he could not find it.

title: A Lovely Love Story
excerpt: Intrigued by that enigma, he dug so deeply into her sentiments that in search of interest he found love, because by trying to make her love him he ended up falling in love with her.

title: Transparent Header
excerpt: The woman let out an expansive laugh that resounded through the house like a spray of broken glass.
